description: The Mnemo app itself: what it is, its modules, how to navigate, settings, themes, sidebar/top bar, language, account—not deep how-tos inside Notes, Mindmap, Chat, or Path (use those skills for module-specific workflows).
detection_hint: mnemo, this app, what is mnemo, settings, where is, how do I open, theme, language, sidebar, top bar, navigation, about the app, account, profile, gamification, cache, appearance, modules, overview, chat, cross-platform, offline, local AI, open source, free, no subscription, no ads

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Application scope: Mnemo is a free, open-source, cross-platform local study app built with Avalonia 11 and .NET 9. It has NO subscriptions, ads, or tracking. It runs fully offline with local AI (LLama.cpp). Modules: Overview (dashboard/welcome/widgets), Notes (block-based rich text editor), Chat (local AI conversational interface), Mindmap (visual knowledge mapping), Path (learning path creation), Settings. Planned/WIP: Flashcards (spaced repetition), Games (Monogame), Explore (download themes/extensions), Progress analytics. Global UI: sidebar (chevron to collapse), top bar (e.g. exit). Settings areas: Account (name, avatar); General (language, gamification, clear cache); Editor (auto-save, spellcheck, note width/spacing/fonts, math/LaTeX rendering); AI Tools (local LLM config, CUDA acceleration); Mindmap (grid, minimap, shift+drag); Appearance (theme, app icon). Tech facts useful for users: Windows/macOS/Linux supported; local AI uses LLaMA models via LLama.cpp; SQLite for local storage; Markdown + LaTeX math rendering in notes. Only answer app-wide topics here—defer module-specific detail to Notes/Mindmap/Path/Chat skills when the user is clearly in one module.
